text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 31 

WALKIN_CLINIC_IND 

LABEL: Walk-in Clinic Services Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is an indicator as to whether or not the pharmacy offers some level of walk-in clinical 
services. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: WALKIN_CLINIC_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: Y = Yes, pharmacy offers a walk-in clinic 
N = No, pharmacy does not offer a walk-in clinic 
Null =
